zh.Little Chart, Kent, England: 英國肯特蕾托 哈特

zh.lifeSummary: 當John James Baldock於1504年出生在英國肯特霍斯蒙登時，他的父親John Sr Baldock15歲，母親Jane Hughes15歲。他於1525年9月10日與Jane Hughes在英國肯特哈德洛福結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1571年在英國肯特霍斯蒙登被列為yeoman。他去世於1571年5月9日在他的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John James Baldock于1504年出生在英国肯特霍斯蒙登时，他的父亲John Sr Baldock15岁，母亲Jane Hughes15岁。他于1525年9月10日与Jane Hughes在英国肯特哈德洛福结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1571年在英国肯特霍斯蒙登被列为yeoman。他去世于1571年5月9日在他的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baldock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Hertfordshire, first named in the 12th century by the Knights Templar, who held the manor there. It was named in commemoration of the city of Baghdad, known in Middle English and Old French as Baldac.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John James Baldock was born in 1504, in Horsmonden, Kent, England, his father, John Sr Baldock, was 15 and his mother, Jane Hughes, was 15. He married Jane Hughes on 10 September 1525, in Hadlow, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. In 1571, at the age of 67, his occupation is listed as yeoman in Horsmonden, Kent, England. He died on 9 May 1571, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John James Baldock est né en 1504, à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Sr Baldock, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Jane Hughes, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Jane Hughes le 10 septembre 1525, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. En 1571, à l’âge de 67 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est yeoman à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 mai 1571, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John James Baldock 1504 in Horsmonden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sr Baldock 15 und seine Mutter Jane Hughes 15. Er hat am 10. September 1525 in Hadlow, Kent, England Jane Hughes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1571, als er 67 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als yeoman in Horsmonden, Kent, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. Mai 1571 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John James Baldock è nato il nel 1504 nel Horsmonden, Kent, England, il suo padre, John Sr Baldock, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Jane Hughes, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Jane Hughes il 10 settembre 1525, nel Hadlow, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1571, all'età di 67 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come yeoman nel Horsmonden, Kent, England. Morì il 9 maggio 1571, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John James Baldockが1504年にイギリスケントホールスモンデンで生まれた時，父John Sr Baldockは15歳，母Jane Hughesは15歳であった。1525年9月10日にイギリスケントハドロウでJane Hughesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1571年，67歳の時，イギリスケントホールスモンデンでの職業はyeomanと記録されている。彼は1571年5月9日に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John James Baldock(이)가 1504년 영국 켄트 호르스몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sr Baldock(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Hughes(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1525년 9월 10일 영국 켄트 하들로에서 Jane Hughes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1571년, 67세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 켄트 호르스몽에서 yeoman이었다. 그는 1571년 5월 9일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John James Baldock nasceu em 1504, em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sr Baldock, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Jane Hughes, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Hughes em 10 de setembro de 1525, em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1571, com 67 anos, sua profissão aparece como yeoman em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 9 de maio de 1571, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John James Baldock родился в 1504 г. в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Sr Baldock было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Hughes, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Hughes 10 сентября 1525 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1571 году, в возрасте 67 лет,  он работал по профессии yeoman в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия. Он умер 9 мая 1571 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John James Baldock nació en 1504, en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Sr Baldock, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Jane Hughes, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Jane Hughes el 10 de septiembre de 1525, en Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1571, a la edad de 67 años, su ocupación registrada era yeoman en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1571, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
